summary: Bug fix verification for ChargeTap EV Charging app - Two bugs tested: Receipt Done button navigation and Phone-as-card double header fix. All backend NFC APIs working correctly.

issues: Header text 'Telefoon als Laadpas' appears twice - once in nav bar, once as step title. This is intentional design per main agent notes, not a bug.

seed_data_creation: Test user created via API registration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified successfully. Receipt Done button navigates to /(tabs)/tap with bottom menu visible. Phone-as-card has single custom header (nav bar) plus step title - this is the intended design. Login flow works with hce-test@example.com/test123.

bug_1_receipt_done_navigation.description: Receipt Done button now uses router.replace('/(tabs)/tap') instead of old navigation
bug_1_receipt_done_navigation.verified: Yes - clicking 'Naar Home' button navigates to /tap with bottom navigation menu visible (Find, Tap, Sessions, Profile)

bug_2_phone_as_card_header.description: Phone-as-card page now uses headerShown: false in _layout.tsx and has its own custom header
bug_2_phone_as_card_header.verified: Yes - Single navigation header bar with back button and title. The step title below icon is intentional design element.
bug_2_phone_as_card_header.start_setup_button: Visible at bottom of screen (position y=1020 in 1080px viewport)

nfc_api_verification.security: Rooted devices blocked, payment method required before provisioning
